title: The Masters Golf Prize Money
summary: The Masters golf tournament is giving out a lot of money this year. The total prize is $22.5 million, which is more than last year. The winner will get $4.5 million, and last year's winner got $4.2 million. The Masters is one of four big golf tournaments called majors, and it has the highest prize money this year. Other tournaments like the PGA Championship, British Open, and U.S. Open have not said how much they will give yet. Rory McIlroy is a golfer who might win again this year. If he does, he will be one of only a few players to win two years in a row. The top four players will all get at least $1 million, and even players who don't make it to the end get $25,000. This shows how important and exciting the Masters is for golfers.

background_read: The Masters is a famous golf tournament held every year in Augusta, Georgia. It is one of four major tournaments in golf, which are the most important events. Golfers from around the world compete to win trophies and money. Prize money has been increasing over the years, making these tournaments very exciting. Understanding prize money helps us see how sports reward top athletes.
Article_Structure: WHO: Golfers like Rory McIlroy and other players in the Masters tournament.
WHAT: The Masters is giving out $22.5 million in prize money, with the winner getting $4.5 million.
WHERE: The tournament takes place in Augusta, Georgia.
WHY: To show how much money is involved in big golf events and highlight the competition.

perspectives.description: Excited about the high prize money and Rory McIlroy's chance to win again.
